rows.src_en: Get tweet replies by tweet ID (V2). Each page returns up to 20 replies. Supports sorting by Relevance, Latest, or Likes.
rows.desc_en: Fetch the replies to a given tweet, returned one page at a time and ordered by relevance, recency, or like count. Read-only; use the returned cursor to walk through subsequent pages.
rows.title_zh: 拉取某条推文下的回复,分页返回,可按相关性、时间或点赞数排序。只读接口,借响应中返回的游标逐页向后翻。

rows.src_en: The tweet ID to get replies for. e.g. 1846987139428634858
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet whose replies you want to retrieve. It is the numeric ID found in the tweet's URL.
rows.title_zh: 要获取回复的目标推文标识,即推文 URL 中的那串数字 ID。

rows.src_en: Cursor for paginating through results. Leave empty for the first page.
rows.desc_en: Pagination token pointing at the next batch of replies. Take it from the `next_cursor` of a previous response; leave it unset to start from the first page.
rows.title_zh: 指向下一批回复的翻页令牌。取自上一次响应的 `next_cursor`;首次请求留空即从第一页开始。

rows.src_en: Sort order for replies. Default is Relevance.
rows.desc_en: Ordering applied to the returned replies: `Relevance` surfaces the replies the platform deems most relevant, `Latest` orders by most recent first, and `Likes` orders by most-liked first.
rows.title_zh: 返回回复的排序方式:`Relevance` 优先展示平台判定最相关的回复,`Latest` 按时间从新到旧,`Likes` 按点赞数从高到低。

rows.desc_en: The replies on this page, each a full tweet object.
rows.title_zh: 本页的回复,每个元素是一条完整的推文对象。

rows.desc_en: Object kind of the record, distinguishing a tweet from other entities the API may return.
rows.title_zh: 记录的对象类型,用于区分推文与接口可能返回的其他实体。

rows.desc_en: The reply tweet's unique identifier; use it to fetch this reply's own replies or to build its URL.
rows.title_zh: 该回复推文的唯一标识;可用于获取这条回复下的下级回复,或拼接其 URL。

rows.desc_en: Direct, clickable link to the reply tweet.
rows.title_zh: 该回复推文的可直接点击链接。

rows.desc_en: Full body text of the reply.
rows.title_zh: 回复的正文文本。

rows.src_en: The source client of the tweet
rows.desc_en: The client application from which the reply was posted, such as a web or mobile app.
rows.title_zh: 发布该回复所用的客户端应用,例如网页端或移动端 App。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been retweeted.
rows.title_zh: 该回复被转推的次数。

rows.desc_en: Number of replies this reply itself has received.
rows.title_zh: 该回复自身收到的回复数。

rows.desc_en: Number of likes the reply has received.
rows.title_zh: 该回复收到的点赞数。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been quote-tweeted.
rows.title_zh: 该回复被引用转推的次数。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been viewed.
rows.title_zh: 该回复的浏览次数。

rows.src_en: The date and time the tweet was created
rows.desc_en: Timestamp of when the reply was posted.
rows.title_zh: 该回复的发布时间。

rows.desc_en: Detected language of the reply text, as a language code.
rows.title_zh: 回复文本经识别得到的语言,以语言代码表示。

rows.desc_en: Number of times the reply has been bookmarked.
rows.title_zh: 该回复被加入书签的次数。

rows.desc_en: Whether this tweet is itself a reply to another tweet.
rows.title_zh: 该推文本身是否为对另一条推文的回复。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the tweet this reply is responding to.
rows.title_zh: 该回复所回应的那条推文的标识。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the conversation thread the reply belongs to; typically the ID of the original tweet that started the thread.
rows.title_zh: 该回复所属对话串的标识,通常为开启该对话的原始推文 ID。

rows.desc_en: Identifier of the user being replied to.
rows.title_zh: 被回复用户的标识。

rows.desc_en: Handle of the user being replied to.
rows.title_zh: 被回复用户的用户名。

rows.src_en: Whether the tweet is a limited reply
rows.desc_en: Whether replying to this tweet is restricted by the author's reply settings.
rows.title_zh: 该推文是否因作者的回复设置而受限,无法自由回复。

rows.src_en: Indicates if there are more results available
rows.desc_en: Whether more replies remain beyond the current page.
rows.title_zh: 当前页之后是否还有更多回复。

rows.src_en: Cursor for fetching the next page of results
rows.desc_en: Token to pass back as `cursor` to retrieve the next page of replies.
rows.title_zh: 用于取回下一页回复的令牌,回传给 `cursor` 参数即可。

rows.desc_en: Outcome of the request: `success` for a normal result, `error` when the request failed.
rows.title_zh: 请求结果:`success` 表示正常返回,`error` 表示请求失败。

rows.src_en: Error message if status is error
rows.desc_en: Human-readable error detail, populated only when the request failed.
rows.title_zh: 可读的错误说明,仅在请求失败时才有内容。
